text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ummm… If your nose is itchy, 
could you tell me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I always receive tissues in the raffles 
around town, so I have… a lot of them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So don't worry about taking too many, okay?
